name: accordion
description: An accordion of disclosure panels with lazily-loaded content — each panel mounts only when first opened, so an in-panel fetch runs once on expand. Single or multiple open, with full keyboard support.

notes: Each header is a button with aria-expanded and aria-controls, wrapped in a heading
Panels are role=region labelled by their header and hidden when collapsed
Up/Down arrows move between headers, Home/End jump to the ends
Disabled sections carry aria-disabled and are skipped by keyboard navigation

intents: disclosure panels whose content loads on first open
a FAQ or settings accordion with keyboard navigation
